features: AirWick Air Freshener Freshmatic Auto Spray Refill
Package Dimensions: 6.9 L x 27.1 H x 15.1 W (centimeters)
description: Airwick pure Freshmatic Max auto sprays release bursts of continuous fresh fragrance so your home always smells welcoming. Just set the air freshener to your preferred fragrance intensity setting and enjoy while the cherry blossom refill fragrances your home. With its improved formula with no added water, Airwick pure neutralises odours with no water fall down and diffuses a fresh a pleasant fragrance in your home. Enhance your home with the fresh scent of cherry blossom, evoking the beauty of a fragile flower. .
